title: Session Runtime Status File
description: Machine-readable session runtime state at <session_dir>/runtime/status.json (§10.3). Rewritten by noted on every state or phase transition. Exists so briefing or a crash investigator can inspect state without relying on the CLI or a running process. This file carries no schema_version field — the version is encoded in its filename, matching the master-plan example at §10.3.

status.description: Top-level session state. Locked vocabulary per §10.1.

phase.description: Finer-grained indicator within status. Locked vocabulary per §10.2.

started_at.description: When capture actually began (moment of the recording-start bell). Null before capture starts.

updated_at.description: When this status record was last written. ISO-8601 with explicit timezone offset.

scheduled_end_time.description: Echoed from the manifest, reflecting any active extension. Null for ad hoc sessions with no scheduled end.

current_extension_minutes.description: Total minutes added by +5 presses in this session.

is_paused.description: True while an active recording session has temporarily suspended audio capture. The top-level status remains recording.

last_error.description: Short human-readable description of the most recent error, if any.
